title: Brave Citizen
tmdbOverview: An expelled boxing champion, who now is a high-school teacher, witnesses intolerable violence and throws her first punch to build justice against it, while putting on a mask.
synopsis: Brave Citizen (2023) is a action, drama and comedy film from South Korea. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
